corrected_fields.summary: This is a high-level ECB overview/navigation page listing general research areas of interest related to fiscal policy and EMU governance, including fiscal spillovers, debt sustainability, EMU integration, and structural reforms. The page contains no specific data, policy decisions, research findings, or publication date. It appears to be a section index rather than an archiveable research document.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source has no direct market relevance. It is a structural index page describing broad ECB research interests in fiscal policy and EMU governance rather than delivering substantive analysis or data that would inform market participants.
